title: tragacantha trichopoda
intro: Tragacantha trichopoda, also known as the Goat's-thorn or Sticktight, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha trichopoda is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
